title: crypto-verification evidence
description: The single test-run recognized from the fix agent's trusted `agent-stdio.log` trajectory (via `_crypto.find_test_run`), plus a `crypto-verification-hash` — the sha256 of `test_output`, or null when `ran` is false / the output is empty. The deterministic crypto-hash-valid check re-verifies the hash.

crypto-verification-hash.description: sha256 hex of `test_output`, or null when `ran` is false / test_output is absent/empty.
